title: Silky Spicy Indian Chicken Curry
description: A rich, creamy chicken curry with a fiery kick and silky texture, perfect for midnight cravings.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and grated ginger; cook for another minute until fragrant.
Add the cumin, coriander, turmeric, and red pepper flakes; toast the spices for 30 seconds.
Add the chicken pieces, coating them well with the spice mixture, and cook until they start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and chicken broth, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer, reduce heat to low, cover, and let it cook for 15 minutes, or until the chicken is fully cooked and tender.
Season with salt to taste, then stir in tamari or coconut aminos for extra umami.
Finish by stirring in fresh cilantro just before serving.
Serve hot with cauliflower rice or a side of sautéed greens for a complete paleo meal.
